summary: Most core UI requirements (opening slide with exact title, multi-slide carousel with 7 romantic slides, and a final 2D-to-3D extrude game with orbit/zoom and reset) appear implemented. The main gap is the required generated image assets (including the romantic icon set) not being evidenced as added/used as specified, and there is apparent Internet Identity/auth scaffolding present despite non-goals/constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the required generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI as background/decoration consistent with the romantic theme.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI references two generated image filenames via /assets/generated/... in OpeningSlide, but the diff summary does not show the required image files being added under frontend/public/assets/generated. Additionally, the required romantic UI icon set (romantic-icons.dim_512x512.png) is not referenced anywhere in the shown UI code.
evidence: (no evidence in diff summary of files under) frontend/public/assets/generated

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity / authentication scaffolding included (InternetIdentityProvider wrapper and identity/actor hooks).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists Internet Identity integration and login/accounts as non-goals, but the diff shows an InternetIdentityProvider being mounted and identity-aware actor hooks present.
